intended_use: Us2.v2 software is used to process acquired transthoracic cardiac ultrasound images, to analyze and make measurements on images in order to provide automated estimation of several cardiac structural a
intended_use_full: Us2.v2 software is used to process acquired transthoracic cardiac ultrasound images, to analyze and make measurements on images in order to provide automated estimation of several cardiac structural and functional parameters, including left/right atrial and ventricular linear dimensions, volumes, systolic function and diastolic function, measured by B mode, M mode and Doppler (PW, CW, tissue) modalities. The data produced by this software is intended to be used to support qualified cardiologists, sonographers, or other licensed professional healthcare practitioners for clinical decision-making.
target_condition: General cardiac assessment via transthoracic echocardiography
ground_truth: Manual analysis by trained echocardiography technicians or cardiologists in reference echo core labs and real-world clinical settings
other_metrics: Root Mean Square Error (RMSE) and Intraclass Correlation Coefficient (ICC) used to evaluate performance against expert human measurements
